log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dhampir — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dhampir — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Dhampir — Unarmored Caster HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 24 damage. Dhampir — Unarmored Caster HP: 24/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Dhampir — Unarmored Caster HP: 11/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 11/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (11/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dhampir — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Dhampir — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Dhampir — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 damage. Dhampir — Unarmored Caster HP: -1/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dhampir — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
